intent: Write a micro-review on 'chargers and power banks — cheap versus trustworthy' for a frequent commuter. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the cell-phones-accessories and electronics categories and collect at least 3 power-related products (wall charger, power bank, USB-C cable). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology for posts on counterfeit chargers or brand safety. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) table the 3 storefront picks, (b) inject one community rule for spotting unsafe gear, (c) recommend a single under-$30 pick. Cite every claim.
